identity.core_concept: Military discipline meets high-end tech. The user is on a mission, not just a diet.

typography.installation: Import from Google Fonts: Barlow Condensed (400, 600, 800), Inter (300, 400, 600), JetBrains Mono (400), Chakra Petch (500, 700)

usage.primary: Call-to-actions, active states, progress completion, critical data highlights.
usage.background: Global app background. NEVER use pure black #000000, use #050505.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on background to prevent banding and add grit.

layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#050505] text-white relative overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4FF00] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#A3CC00] active:scale-95 transition-all skew-x-[-10deg] px-6 py-3 rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4FF00] text-[#D4FF00] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#D4FF00]/10 transition-all px-6 py-3 rounded-none

cards.mission: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-l-4 border-[#D4FF00] p-6 relative overflow-hidden group hover:bg-[#121212] transition-colors
cards.stat: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#27272A] p-4 flex flex-col justify-between h-full relative

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#27272A] text-white placeholder:text-gray-600 focus:border-[#D4FF00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4FF00] rounded-none px-4 py-3 transition-all outline-none

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-[#050505]/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-[#27272A] h-16 flex items-center justify-around z-50

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use gradients on backgrounds. Use flat #050505 with noise texture.
Use the 'chamfered' clip-path for primary buttons to give a military tag feel.
The 'Mission of the Day' is the HERO of the home screen. Make it big, bold, and imposing.
For the Chat, mimic a secure tactical comms channel. Monospace font for timestamps.
Progress bars should be segmented (dashed), not solid lines.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' uppercase for all section headers.
Ensure the bottom navigation bar is touch-friendly (44px min touch target).
universal_guidelines: No AI Slop: Avoid generic rounded cards with heavy drop shadows.
Dark Mode Clarity: Ensure text contrast is high (White/Off-white on Black).
Performance: Optimize images and use lazy loading.
Interactivity: All tap targets must give immediate visual feedback (color change or scale).
